11208:304347.name: User presses side BACK button on mouse AND moves scroll wheel DOWN THEN Horizontal scroll moves LEFT to RIGHT User presses side BACK button on mouse AND moves scroll wheel UP  THEN Horizontal scroll moves RIGHT to LEFT User presses side FORWARD button on mouse AND moves scroll wheel DOWN THEN Horizontal scroll moves RIGHT TO LEFT User presses FORWARD side button on mouse AND moves scroll wheel UP  THEN Horizontal scroll moves LEFT TO RIGHT
11208:304347.text_content:
User presses side BACK button on mouse AND moves scroll wheel DOWN
THEN Horizontal scroll moves LEFT to RIGHT
User presses side BACK button on mouse AND moves scroll wheel UP 
THEN Horizontal scroll moves RIGHT to LEFT

User presses side FORWARD button on mouse AND moves scroll wheel DOWN
THEN Horizontal scroll moves RIGHT TO LEFT
User presses FORWARD side button on mouse AND moves scroll wheel UP 
THEN Horizontal scroll moves LEFT TO RIGHT

11208:304349.name: User presses side FORWARD button on mouse AND moves scroll wheel DOWN THEN Horizontal scroll moves LEFT to RIGHT User presses side FORWARD button on mouse AND moves scroll wheel UP  THEN Horizontal scroll moves RIGHT to LEFT User presses side BACK button on mouse AND moves scroll wheel DOWN THEN Horizontal scroll moves RIGHT TO LEFT User presses BACK side button on mouse AND moves scroll wheel UP  THEN Horizontal scroll moves LEFT TO RIGHT
11208:304349.text_content:
User presses side FORWARD button on mouse AND moves scroll wheel DOWN
THEN Horizontal scroll moves LEFT to RIGHT
User presses side FORWARD button on mouse AND moves scroll wheel UP 
THEN Horizontal scroll moves RIGHT to LEFT

User presses side BACK button on mouse AND moves scroll wheel DOWN
THEN Horizontal scroll moves RIGHT TO LEFT
User presses BACK side button on mouse AND moves scroll wheel UP 
THEN Horizontal scroll moves LEFT TO RIGHT

11211:439068.name: When key is active, the tooltip appears and is persistent.
11211:439068.text_content: When key is active, the tooltip appears and is persistent.

11211:439245.name: When a key is active, when the user hovers over a different key, the active tooltip disappears. The tooltip of the key that the user is hovering on appears.
11211:439245.text_content:
When a key is active, when the user hovers over a different key, the active tooltip disappears.

The tooltip of the key that the user is hovering on appears.

11211:439422.name: When the user stops hovering on the key, the tooltip disappears. The selected key’s tooltip appears again.
11211:439422.text_content: When the user stops hovering on the key, the tooltip disappears. The selected key’s tooltip appears again.

11208:305710.name: Pre-selected preset values of 1600 and 2000 are available as diamond markers. The current controller on the slider by default stays in the middle of the slider (3000) every time when the user revisits this screen. Preset Sequence by default is ‘Lowest to Highest’. Current value stays visible, preset marker value shows on hover/active.
11208:305710.text_content:
Pre-selected preset values of 1600 and 2000 are available as diamond markers.
The current controller on the slider by default stays in the middle of the slider (3000) every time when the user revisits this screen.
Preset Sequence by default is ‘Lowest to Highest’. 
Current value stays visible, preset marker value shows on hover/active.

11208:305720.text_content: Hover and click the trash icon area to remove.

11208:305738.text_content: Users can also add a third custom value (4000) by dragging the controller on the slider to the expected spot.

11208:305847.name: Preset marker active state: the user just saved a value from the slider, so the preset marker is overlaying with the current controller. Then if the user continues to move the controller it will switch back to the default state.

the user just saved a value from the slider, so the preset marker is overlaying with the current controller. Then if the user continues to move the controller it will switch back to the default state.

11208:307492.name: When the mouse is connected via dongle and enters sleep, is out of range, or is turned off: The ‘Cursor Speed (DPI) Switch’ action is greyed out in the assignable actions list for all buttons. If a button already has this action assigned: The action remains assigned. The Edit button is disabled. The Remove button stays active so users can change the action. A tooltip appears on hover over the greyed-out action: “This device may be in sleep mode, out of range, or turned off.” In these idle states, the system cannot detect which button has the action, so the usual warning message is suppressed. Once the mouse becomes active again: The UI refreshes automatically. The action becomes available again. The tooltip disappears.
11208:307492.text_content:
When the mouse is connected via dongle and enters sleep, is out of range, or is turned off:
The ‘Cursor Speed (DPI) Switch’ action is greyed out in the assignable actions list for all buttons.
If a button already has this action assigned:
The action remains assigned.
The Edit button is disabled.
The Remove button stays active so users can change the action.
A tooltip appears on hover over the greyed-out action: “This device may be in sleep mode, out of range, or turned off.”
In these idle states, the system cannot detect which button has the action, so the usual warning message is suppressed.
Once the mouse becomes active again:
The UI refreshes automatically.
The action becomes available again.
The tooltip disappears.

11208:307550.name: If the overlay page is open when the mouse goes to sleep, the preset slot box and slider should become inactive (greyed out)
11208:307550.text_content: If the overlay page is open when the mouse goes to sleep, the preset slot box and slider should become inactive (greyed out)

11208:307260.name: By default, there are 4 pre-selected preset values in preset. The current controller on the slider by default stays in the middle of the slider (3000) every time when the user revisits this screen.
11208:307260.text_content:
By default, there are 4 pre-selected preset values in preset.
The current controller on the slider by default stays in the middle of the slider (3000) every time when the user revisits this screen.

when there is new value assigned to the button, the “restore to default actions” button is enabled.
when user click on “restore to default actions” button, all value assigned to button will be restored to factory value

and the button will be unselected

11303:94215.name: Pre-selected preset values of 1600 and 2000 are available as diamond markers. The current controller on the slider by default stays in the middle of the slider (3000) every time when the user revisits this screen. Preset Sequence by default is ‘Lowest to Highest’. Current value stays visible, preset marker value shows on hover/active.
11303:94215.text_content:
Pre-selected preset values of 1600 and 2000 are available as diamond markers.
The current controller on the slider by default stays in the middle of the slider (3000) every time when the user revisits this screen.
Preset Sequence by default is ‘Lowest to Highest’. 
Current value stays visible, preset marker value shows on hover/active.

11303:94225.name: Hover and click the trash icon area to remove.
11303:94225.text_content: Hover and click the trash icon area to remove.

11303:94227.name: Move the Preset Marker on the slider to edit certain preset
11303:94227.text_content: Move the Preset Marker on the slider to edit certain preset

11303:94229.name: Value on the Preset Marker should correspond to the movement
11303:94229.text_content: Value on the Preset Marker should correspond to the movement

11303:94231.name: Value in the box should correspond to the change on the slider when drop
11303:94231.text_content: Value in the box should correspond to the change on the slider when drop

11303:94233.name: Show ‘+’ button after remove. ‘Remove’ hover state disabled when there is <=2 preset.
11303:94233.text_content:
Show ‘+’ button after remove.
‘Remove’ hover state disabled when there is <=2 preset.

11303:94235.name: Tooltip hover state when hover on active slot
11303:94235.text_content: Tooltip hover state when hover on active slot

11303:94237.name: Tooltip hover state when hover on preset on the slider
11303:94237.text_content: Tooltip hover state when hover on preset on the slider

11303:94239.name: Now, the preset is saved. The current controller will change from circle to diamond as preset marker.
11303:94239.text_content: Now, the preset is saved. The current controller will change from circle to diamond as preset marker.

11303:94241.name: The user clicks on the empty ‘+’ button.
11303:94241.text_content: The user clicks on the empty ‘+’ button.

11303:94243.name: Users can also add a third custom value (4000) by dragging the controller on the slider to the expected spot.
11303:94243.text_content: Users can also add a third custom value (4000) by dragging the controller on the slider to the expected spot.

11303:94352.name: Preset marker active state: the user just saved a value from the slider, so the preset marker is overlaying with the current controller. Then if the user continues to move the controller it will switch back to the default state.
11303:94352.text_content:
Preset marker active state:
the user just saved a value from the slider, so the preset marker is overlaying with the current controller. Then if the user continues to move the controller it will switch back to the default state.

11303:94546.name: You are currently using this preset. To change this value, first switch to a different preset by pressing the mouse button that is assigned to Cursor Speed (DPI) Switch.
11303:94546.text_content: You are currently using this preset. To change this value, first switch to a different preset by pressing the mouse button that is assigned to Cursor Speed (DPI) Switch.

11303:94742.name: Following the Windows Toast Notification Guideline
11303:94742.text_content: Following the Windows Toast Notification Guideline

11303:94744.name: Align with Windows requirement for notification.  Only show 1st time switch, e.g. if the user clicks for 5 times.
11303:94744.text_content:
Align with Windows requirement for notification. 
Only show 1st time switch, e.g. if the user clicks for 5 times.

11303:94887.name: text
11303:94887.text_content: To cycle through two to five speeds, assign a button to “Cursor Speed (DPI) Switch” in Button Customization. Certain models have a button assigned this action by default.

11303:95450.text_content: User goes to Single DPI Slider

11303:95494.name: When the mouse is connected via dongle and enters sleep, is out of range, or is turned off: The ‘Cursor Speed (DPI) Switch’ action is greyed out in the assignable actions list for all buttons. If a button already has this action assigned: The action remains assigned. The Edit button is disabled. The Remove button stays active so users can change the action. A tooltip appears on hover over the greyed-out action: “This device may be in sleep mode, out of range, or turned off.” In these idle states, the system cannot detect which button has the action, so the usual warning message is suppressed. Once the mouse becomes active again: The UI refreshes automatically. The action becomes available again. The tooltip disappears.
11303:95494.text_content:
When the mouse is connected via dongle and enters sleep, is out of range, or is turned off:
The ‘Cursor Speed (DPI) Switch’ action is greyed out in the assignable actions list for all buttons.
If a button already has this action assigned:
The action remains assigned.
The Edit button is disabled.
The Remove button stays active so users can change the action.
A tooltip appears on hover over the greyed-out action: “This device may be in sleep mode, out of range, or turned off.”
In these idle states, the system cannot detect which button has the action, so the usual warning message is suppressed.
Once the mouse becomes active again:
The UI refreshes automatically.
The action becomes available again.
The tooltip disappears.

11303:95552.name: If the overlay page is open when the mouse goes to sleep, the preset slot box and slider should become inactive (greyed out)
11303:95552.text_content: If the overlay page is open when the mouse goes to sleep, the preset slot box and slider should become inactive (greyed out)

11303:96303.name: By default, there are 4 pre-selected preset values in preset. The current controller on the slider by default stays in the middle of the slider (3000) every time when the user revisits this screen.
11303:96303.text_content:
By default, there are 4 pre-selected preset values in preset.
The current controller on the slider by default stays in the middle of the slider (3000) every time when the user revisits this screen.

11303:96415.text_content: Warning message shown when user attempts to assign Cursor Speed (DPI) Switch action, when this action is already assigned on another mouse button.

11303:96581.text_content: To customize, click one of the outlined keys on the image to the left

11213:24929.name: Copy
11213:24929.text_content:
Cycle through different Cursor Speed (DPI) values at the press of a button.

Consider choosing a lower value for precision work and a higher value when you need to move your cursor quickly across a large screen or multiple monitors.

11213:25002.name: Copy
11213:25002.text_content: Manage the responsiveness of your mouse with Polling Rate. Higher rates increase the frequency that your mouse reports its position to your system.

11213:25038.name: Copy
11213:25038.text_content: Work more efficiently by assigning commonly used actions to occur when you click the outlined buttons
